case_title: ATIQUE REHMAN VS. MALCOLM BRIAN VASQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, MALCOLM BRIAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REHMAN, ATIQUE SERVED APR-07-2006, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REHMAN, ATIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, MALCOLM BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 308 TURK ST. #14, S.F. CA. 94102, INCLUDING ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS, PER 415.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REHMAN, ATIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, MALCOLM BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/05/2006 $3,399.80 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $380.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,079.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
